source: Dune decoded creation/init tables for Uniswap V2 pairs, Uniswap V3 pools, and Uniswap V4 pool IDs
batch_boundary: Track A scope boundary on 2026-06-02: wallet-facing router, manager, Permit2, Universal Router, UniswapX signing, UniswapX reactor settlement, and reviewed mainnet direct pool/pair samples are evaluated through concrete deployments/manifests or source-materialized callkeys. Full factory-child universes remain explicit batches because they require generated source/live-input population before every discovered child address can be routed.

covered_in_track_a: Uniswap V2 Router02 user swaps and liquidity calls through concrete router deployments
Uniswap V3 SwapRouter02 swaps and NFPM position NFT/liquidity/fee calls through concrete deployments
Uniswap V4 PositionManager wallet-facing position calls and PoolManager.initialize fail-closed unknown path
Universal Router execute variants and nested actions through concrete deployments
Permit2 allowance signing and direct allowance-management surfaces already represented by concrete manifests
UniswapX typed-data signing surfaces under registryV2/manifests/uniswapx
UniswapX reactor settlement entrypoints decode SignedOrder bytes into Amm::SettleIntentOrder for supported reactor families
Representative mainnet direct Uniswap V3 pool swap emits Amm::Swap via source-materialized token0/token1/fee context; remaining reviewed mutable pool entrypoints route explicit Unknown/fail-closed
deferred_to_track_b: Full Uniswap V2 pair universe materialization beyond reviewed LP token samples
Full Uniswap V3 pool universe materialization beyond reviewed mainnet direct-pool sample
Full Uniswap V4 pool-id semantics beyond wallet-facing manager paths

universe_batches.reason: Track A covers user-facing Router02/Universal Router paths; direct pair calls and LP-token generation require a Track B source resolver plus direct pair semantics.
universe_batches.boundary: all decoded V2 PairCreated rows counted by Dune query 7629549 for ethereum/base/optimism/arbitrum

universe_batches.reason: Track A covers SwapRouter02, NFPM, Universal Router, and V4 PositionManager wallet-facing surfaces; direct pool calls require generated callkeys and pool-level action semantics.
universe_batches.boundary: all decoded V3 PoolCreated rows counted by Dune query 7629549 for ethereum/base/optimism/arbitrum

universe_batches.reason: Track A keeps wallet-facing V4 PositionManager coverage and explicit PoolManager.initialize unknown handling; full V4 pool-id semantics need a dedicated Track B model.
universe_batches.boundary: all decoded V4 PoolManager initialize pool ids counted by Dune query 7629549 for ethereum/base/optimism
